Regular publishing schedule

title: The OpenClaw superfan meetup serves optimism and lobster
description:
The woman at the door wore a plush lobster headdress. 
She sat in the front hallway of a multistory event venue in Manhattan, beside a bundle of wristbands. If she granted you one, the world of ClawCon beckoned behind her - full of vibey pink and purple lighting, lobster claw headbands, multicolored name tags, sponsor information stations, and a demo stage underneath a skylight. Hundreds of people were gathered to celebrate OpenClaw, the AI assistant platform created by Peter Steinberger in November 2025. 
OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbolt) has quickly become popular in the tech industry for being open-source, in contrast …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Peter Steinberger가 2025년 11월 창조한 오픈소스 AI 어시스턴트 플랫폼 OpenClaw의 팬 미팅 ClawCon이 뉴욕 맨하탄에서 열렸습니다. 수백 명이 참석한 이 행사는 분홍색과 보라색 조명, 랍스터 테마 장식으로 꾸며졌습니다. OpenClaw는 오픈소스 특성으로 기술 업계에서 빠르게 인기를 얻고 있습니다.
summary_en: ClawCon, a fan meetup for OpenClaw, the open-source AI assistant platform created by Peter Steinberger in November 2025, was held in Manhattan, New York. The event attracted hundreds of attendees with pink and purple lighting and lobster-themed decorations. OpenClaw has quickly gained popularity in the tech industry for being open-source.
so_what_ko: 오픈소스 AI 플랫폼이 강력한 커뮤니티와 브랜드 충성도를 구축할 수 있음을 보여주며, D2C 브랜드도 커뮤니티 중심 마케팅을 통해 유사한 효과를 얻을 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates how open-source AI platforms can build strong communities and brand loyalty, and D2C brands can achieve similar effects through community-driven marketing.
key_points: OpenClaw AI assistant platform launched November 2025
Successful fan meetup with hundreds of attendees
Open-source approach driving popularity
Strong community engagement with themed events

title: [AINews] AI Engineer will be the LAST job
description: a quiet day lets us reflect on the jobs debate.
summary_ko: Latent Space에서 AI 엔지니어가 마지막 직업이 될 것이라는 주제로 AI와 일자리에 대한 논의를 다뤘습니다. 조용한 날을 통해 일자리 논쟁에 대해 성찰하는 시간을 가졌습니다. AI 기술 발전이 직업 시장에 미치는 영향에 대한 분석입니다.
summary_en: Latent Space discussed the topic that AI Engineers will be the last job, addressing debates about AI and employment. They used a quiet day to reflect on the jobs debate. This represents analysis of AI technology's impact on the job market.
so_what_ko: AI 기술 발전이 직업 구조를 변화시키고 있으며, D2C 기업들은 AI 도구 활용을 통한 효율성 증대와 동시에 인력 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: AI technology advancement is changing job structures, requiring D2C companies to review their workforce strategies while increasing efficiency through AI tool adoption.
key_points: Discussion on AI's impact on job market
AI Engineers as potentially last remaining job
Reflection on employment debates

so_what_ko: 일일 퍼즐 콘텐츠는 사용자 재방문을 유도하고 브랜드 충성도를 높이는 효과적인 콘텐츠 마케팅 전략입니다.
so_what_en: Daily puzzle content is an effective content marketing strategy that drives user return visits and increases brand loyalty.
key_points: Daily Wordle puzzle assistance
Regular content series
Reader engagement strategy

Reader engagement through gaming guides
Regular content series format

description: Here are some hints and the answers for the NYT Connections puzzle No. 1,001 for Sunday, March 8.

so_what_en: Regular help content can aid brand loyalty building, but offers limited direct strategic implications for D2C businesses.
key_points: NYT puzzle assistance content series
Milestone puzzle number (1,001)
Consistent reader service approach

title: The AI Doc is an overwrought hype piece for doomers and accelerationists alike
description:
Co-director Daniel Roher. | Image: Focus Features	

We are in the thick of a massive push to incorporate generative AI into almost every aspect of our lives, but it is still easy to be confused about what it is and how it works. It doesn't help that many of gen AI's proponents and detractors both speak about it with a feverish hyperbole that comes across like fantastical ad copy. And the rate at which AI firms release new iterations of their products can make it hard to keep track of what's going on in the industry as a whole.
In The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist, codirectors Daniel Roher and Charlie Tyrell attempt to make sense of this moment in gen AI's rise to prominence The f …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: The Verge가 생성형 AI 다큐멘터리 'The AI Doc'에 대한 비평 기사를 게재했습니다. 다니엘 로러와 찰리 티렐이 공동 연출한 이 다큐는 생성형 AI의 부상을 다루고 있습니다. 기사는 AI 업계의 과장된 홍보와 혼란스러운 정보 전달 방식을 비판했습니다.
summary_en: The Verge published a critical review of 'The AI Doc' documentary co-directed by Daniel Roher and Charlie Tyrell. The documentary addresses the rise of generative AI and current industry developments. The article criticizes the hyperbolic marketing and confusing information delivery in the AI industry.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기술을 마케팅할 때 과장된 표현보다는 명확하고 실질적인 가치 제안에 집중해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should focus on clear, practical value propositions rather than hyperbolic messaging when marketing AI technologies.
key_points: Documentary review covering generative AI industry
Criticism of hyperbolic AI marketing practices
Challenge of tracking rapid AI product iterations

title: Netflix enriches ad-targeting prowess with Amazon, Yahoo audience data
description: Deeper integrations with the companies’ demand-side platforms and a new Conversion API tool land ahead of the key upfronts season.
summary_ko: 넷플릭스가 아마존과 야후의 오디언스 데이터를 활용하여 광고 타겟팅 기능을 강화했습니다. 두 회사의 DSP와의 깊은 통합과 새로운 Conversion API 도구를 도입했습니다. 이는 중요한 업프론트 시즌을 앞두고 이뤄진 전략적 움직임입니다.
summary_en: Netflix enhanced its ad-targeting capabilities by leveraging audience data from Amazon and Yahoo. The company introduced deeper integrations with their demand-side platforms and a new Conversion API tool. This strategic move comes ahead of the crucial upfronts season.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 다양한 플랫폼의 오디언스 데이터를 통합하여 더 정밀한 타겟팅과 전환 추적이 가능한 광고 전략을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should integrate audience data from multiple platforms to build more precise targeting and conversion tracking capabilities in their advertising strategies.
key_points: Netflix partnering with Amazon and Yahoo for audience data
New Conversion API tool implementation
Strategic timing ahead of upfronts season

title: Retail and grocery brands dominate ChatGPT ads
description: Since OpenAI began running ads four weeks ago, data tracked by Sensor Tower showed more than 100 individual brand promotions.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 ChatGPT에서 광고 서비스를 시작한 지 4주 만에 100개 이상의 브랜드가 광고를 집행했습니다. Sensor Tower 데이터에 따르면 리테일과 식료품 브랜드들이 ChatGPT 광고를 주도하고 있습니다. 이는 AI 플랫폼에서의 새로운 광고 트렌드를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: More than 100 individual brands have run promotions on ChatGPT within four weeks of OpenAI launching ads. Sensor Tower data shows retail and grocery brands dominating ChatGPT advertising. This represents a new advertising trend on AI platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 ChatGPT와 같은 AI 플랫폼의 광고 기회를 조기에 활용하여 새로운 고객 접점을 확보하고 경쟁 우위를 점해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage early advertising opportunities on AI platforms like ChatGPT to secure new customer touchpoints and gain competitive advantage.
key_points: Over 100 brands advertising on ChatGPT in 4 weeks
Retail and grocery brands leading adoption
New advertising channel emergence on AI platforms

title: Why Unleashed Brands tapped VaynerX to pump up social media marketing
description: CMO Pat O’Toole, formerly of Burger King, details his first campaign at the youth-enrichment company, in support of Urban Air Adventure Park.
summary_ko: 청소년 교육 서비스 기업 Unleashed Brands가 소셜미디어 마케팅 강화를 위해 VaynerX와 파트너십을 체결했습니다. 버거킹 출신 CMO Pat O'Toole이 Urban Air Adventure Park를 지원하는 첫 번째 캠페인을 진행합니다. 소셜미디어 전문 에이전시를 통한 마케팅 역량 강화에 집중하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Unleashed Brands, a youth-enrichment company, partnered with VaynerX to strengthen their social media marketing capabilities. CMO Pat O'Toole, formerly from Burger King, is leading the first campaign supporting Urban Air Adventure Park. The company is focusing on enhancing marketing capabilities through specialized social media agencies.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들이 소셜미디어 전문 에이전시와의 파트너십을 통해 마케팅 역량을 확장하는 전략이 증가하고 있어, 내부 역량 대신 전문성을 활용한 접근이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands are increasingly leveraging partnerships with specialized social media agencies to expand marketing capabilities, requiring focus on expert collaboration rather than purely internal capabilities.
key_points: Unleashed Brands partners with VaynerX for social media marketing
Former Burger King CMO Pat O'Toole leads the initiative
First campaign focuses on Urban Air Adventure Park

title: Influencer pay lacks transparency: Here’s what the numbers say
description: Despite an increase in spending on creators, just 51% of marketers have full clarity into influencer compensation.
summary_ko: 인플루언서 마케팅 지출이 증가하고 있음에도 불구하고 마케터의 51%만이 인플루언서 보상에 대한 완전한 투명성을 확보하고 있습니다. 인플루언서 수수료 구조의 불투명성이 마케팅 업계의 주요 과제로 대두되고 있습니다. 크리에이터 경제의 성장과 함께 보상 체계의 표준화 필요성이 증가하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Despite increased spending on influencer marketing, only 51% of marketers have full transparency into influencer compensation structures. The lack of clarity in influencer payment systems has emerged as a major challenge in the marketing industry. The growing creator economy highlights the need for standardized compensation frameworks.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 인플루언서 마케팅 투자 대비 성과를 정확히 측정하기 위해 투명한 보상 체계를 구축하고 ROI 추적 시스템을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must establish transparent compensation frameworks and strengthen ROI tracking systems to accurately measure performance against influencer marketing investments.
key_points: Only 51% of marketers have full clarity on influencer compensation
Transparency issues persist despite increased creator spending
Need for standardized influencer payment frameworks

title: Navigating identity in a cookieless, compliant world
description:
At the March MarTech Conference, we discussed how the end of cookies is a chance to trade 'creepy' tracking for real trust. 
The post Navigating identity in a cookieless, compliant world appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 3월 MarTech 컨퍼런스에서 쿠키 종료 시대에 대응하는 신원 확인 전략이 논의되었습니다. 쿠키 종료는 '소름끼치는' 추적을 진정한 신뢰로 대체할 기회로 제시되었습니다. 규제 준수와 개인정보 보호를 중시하는 새로운 마케팅 접근법이 필요한 시점입니다.
summary_en: The March MarTech Conference discussed identity strategies for the cookieless era and regulatory compliance. The end of cookies was presented as an opportunity to replace 'creepy' tracking with genuine trust-building. New marketing approaches prioritizing compliance and privacy protection are becoming essential.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 쿠키리스 환경에서 퍼스트파티 데이터 수집과 고객 신뢰 구축에 기반한 새로운 마케팅 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop new marketing strategies based on first-party data collection and customer trust-building in the cookieless environment.
key_points: Cookieless future requires new identity strategies
Opportunity to replace tracking with trust-building
Focus on compliance and privacy protection

title: Why your outreach fails before prospects even read it
description:
Messaging success depends on how buyers process what they read. Learn how readability, tone, cognitive load and channel influence response.
The post Why your outreach fails before prospects even read it appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 아웃리치 메시징의 성공은 구매자가 콘텐츠를 처리하는 방식에 달려있다는 분석이 제시되었습니다. 가독성, 톤, 인지적 부담, 채널 선택이 응답률에 직접적인 영향을 미칩니다. 메시지 전달 전 단계에서부터 실패가 결정되는 경우가 많아 전략적 접근이 필요합니다.
summary_en: Analysis shows that outreach messaging success depends on how buyers process the content they receive. Readability, tone, cognitive load, and channel selection directly impact response rates. Strategic approach is needed as failures are often determined before prospects even engage with the message.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 고객 아웃리치에서 메시지의 가독성과 인지적 부담을 최적화하여 고객 응답률과 참여도를 향상시켜야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should optimize message readability and cognitive load in customer outreach to improve response rates and engagement.
key_points: Outreach success depends on content processing by buyers
Readability, tone, and cognitive load affect response rates
Channel selection impacts messaging effectiveness

title: Why organic search is becoming a brand trust channel
description:
Search is shifting from traffic acquisition to brand trust. Learn why narrative control, authority and omnipresence now define SEO success.
The post Why organic search is becoming a brand trust channel appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 오가닉 검색이 트래픽 획득에서 브랜드 신뢰 구축 채널로 역할이 변화하고 있습니다. 내러티브 통제, 권위성, 전방위적 존재감이 현재 SEO 성공의 핵심 요소로 정의되고 있습니다. 검색 최적화 전략이 단순한 노출에서 브랜드 신뢰도 향상으로 패러다임이 전환되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Organic search is shifting from traffic acquisition to becoming a brand trust-building channel. Narrative control, authority, and omnipresence now define SEO success rather than simple visibility metrics. Search optimization strategies are transitioning from mere exposure to brand credibility enhancement.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 SEO 전략을 트래픽 중심에서 브랜드 신뢰도 구축 중심으로 전환하여 장기적인 고객 관계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must shift SEO strategies from traffic-focused to trust-building centered approaches to establish long-term customer relationships.
key_points: Organic search evolving from traffic to trust channel
Narrative control and authority becoming key SEO factors
Omnipresence strategy replaces simple visibility metrics

title: Why most marketers are still only experimenting with AI
description:
Executives are pushing hard for AI adoption, but most marketing teams lack the needed strategy, training and data.
The post Why most marketers are still only experimenting with AI appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 대부분의 마케터들이 AI를 아직 실험 단계에서만 활용하고 있는 상황입니다. 경영진은 AI 도입을 강력히 추진하지만, 마케팅 팀은 필요한 전략, 교육, 데이터가 부족한 상태입니다. 이로 인해 AI의 본격적인 마케팅 활용이 지연되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Most marketers are still only experimenting with AI rather than fully implementing it. While executives are pushing hard for AI adoption, marketing teams lack the necessary strategy, training, and data infrastructure. This gap is causing delays in the full-scale implementation of AI in marketing operations.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 AI 도입 전 명확한 전략 수립과 팀 교육, 데이터 인프라 구축을 우선적으로 진행해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should prioritize establishing clear AI strategies, team training, and data infrastructure before pursuing AI adoption.
key_points: Executive pressure for AI adoption exists but implementation lags
Marketing teams lack strategy, training, and data for effective AI use
Gap between AI expectations and current capabilities
Need for structured approach to AI implementation

title: The Trade Desk CEO Jeff Green Dropped $148M on Company Stock
description: The CEO says he's putting his money where his mouth is — and took the opportunity to call out Amazon's DSP along the way.
summary_ko: 트레이드 데스크 CEO 제프 그린이 자사 주식에 1억 4,800만 달러를 투자했습니다. CEO는 자신의 확신을 행동으로 보여준다고 밝혔습니다. 이 과정에서 아마존의 DSP를 비판하는 발언도 함께 했습니다.
summary_en: The Trade Desk CEO Jeff Green invested $148 million in company stock. The CEO stated he's putting his money where his mouth is, demonstrating confidence in the company. He also took the opportunity to criticize Amazon's DSP platform during this announcement.
so_what_ko: 리더십의 강한 확신과 투자는 시장 신뢰도를 높이며, 경쟁사 대비 차별화 메시지 전달에 효과적입니다.
so_what_en: Strong leadership conviction and investment can boost market confidence while providing opportunities for competitive differentiation messaging.
key_points: CEO invested $148M in own company stock
Demonstrates strong leadership confidence
Used opportunity to criticize competitor Amazon DSP
Personal investment as marketing signal

title: The Role of Purpose in Marketing Strategy with Yoobi’s Sarah Leinberger
description: Plus, how moving forward with incomplete information can be a winning strategy.
summary_ko: 유비의 사라 라인버거가 마케팅 전략에서 목적의 역할에 대해 논의했습니다. 불완전한 정보로도 앞으로 나아가는 것이 승리 전략이 될 수 있다고 강조했습니다. 브랜드 목적과 실행력의 균형이 중요하다는 메시지를 전달했습니다.
summary_en: Yoobi's Sarah Leinberger discussed the role of purpose in marketing strategy. She emphasized that moving forward with incomplete information can be a winning strategy. The discussion highlighted the importance of balancing brand purpose with execution capabilities.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 완벽한 정보를 기다리기보다 명확한 목적을 바탕으로 빠른 실행을 통해 시장 우위를 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can gain market advantage by executing quickly with clear purpose rather than waiting for perfect information.
key_points: Purpose-driven marketing strategy discussion
Moving forward with incomplete information as strategy
Balance between brand purpose and execution
Agile decision-making in marketing

title: Why So Many Brands Are Throwing Shade at Their Competitors Right Now
description: Brands get off on looking nervy, and social media loves a good fight.
summary_ko: 많은 브랜드들이 현재 경쟁사를 공격하는 마케팅 전략을 사용하고 있습니다. 브랜드들은 도전적인 이미지를 선호하고 있으며, 소셜 미디어는 이러한 경쟁 구도를 좋아합니다. 공격적 마케팅이 브랜드 주목도 상승에 효과적이라는 분석입니다.
summary_en: Many brands are currently using competitive attack strategies against their rivals. Brands prefer projecting a bold, challenging image, and social media amplifies these competitive battles. This aggressive marketing approach is proving effective for increasing brand attention and engagement.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 경쟁사 대비 차별화 포인트를 활용한 공격적 마케팅으로 소셜 미디어 화제성과 브랜드 인지도를 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage competitive differentiation through bold marketing strategies to increase social media buzz and brand awareness.
key_points: Brands increasingly using competitive attack strategies
Social media amplifies brand rivalry and conflicts
Bold positioning generates attention and engagement
Competitive messaging as differentiation tool

title: Ticker: Gayle King to Remain at CBS Mornings, EP Departs
description: Plus, Versant has its first earnings call.
summary_ko: 게일 킹이 CBS 모닝스에 계속 남기로 했으며, 이그제큐티브 프로듀서는 떠났습니다. 버산트의 첫 번째 실적 발표도 있었습니다. 미디어 업계의 인사 변동과 기업 실적 소식을 다뤘습니다.
summary_en: Gayle King will remain at CBS Mornings while the executive producer is departing. Versant also had its first earnings call during this period. The news covers media industry personnel changes and corporate financial updates.
so_what_ko: 미디어 업계 변화는 D2C 브랜드의 광고 및 콘텐츠 파트너십 전략에 영향을 줄 수 있어 지속적인 모니터링이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Media industry changes can impact D2C advertising and content partnership strategies, requiring continuous monitoring of key personnel shifts.
key_points: CBS Mornings host Gayle King staying
Executive producer departure
Versant's first earnings call
Media industry personnel changes

title: Streaming Ratings, Week of Feb. 2: Netflix’s The Lincoln Lawyer Makes Its Case
description: Bridgerton fell to second.
summary_ko: 넷플릭스의 '링컨 로이어'가 스트리밍 순위에서 주목받고 있습니다. 기존 인기작 '브리저튼'이 2위로 밀려나면서 새로운 콘텐츠가 시청자들의 관심을 끌고 있습니다. 스트리밍 플랫폼에서 콘텐츠 경쟁이 치열해지고 있는 상황입니다.
summary_en: Netflix's 'The Lincoln Lawyer' is gaining attention in streaming rankings. The previously popular 'Bridgerton' has fallen to second place as new content captures viewer interest. Competition among streaming platform content is intensifying.
so_what_ko: 콘텐츠 마케팅에서 새로운 IP의 성공 사례를 분석하여 D2C 브랜드의 콘텐츠 전략 수립에 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Analyzing successful new IP cases in content marketing can inform D2C brands' content strategy development.
key_points: Netflix's The Lincoln Lawyer rises in streaming rankings
Bridgerton drops to second place
Streaming content competition intensifying

title: [AINews] GPT 5.4: SOTA Knowledge Work -and- Coding -and- CUA Model, OpenAI is so very back
description: An enormous win for OpenAI.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 GPT-5.4 모델을 출시하며 지식 업무와 코딩 분야에서 최고 성능을 달성했습니다. 이는 OpenAI의 중요한 복귀로 평가받고 있습니다. 새로운 모델은 다양한 업무 영역에서 혁신적인 성능 향상을 보여주고 있습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI has released GPT-5.4, achieving state-of-the-art performance in knowledge work and coding. This is being evaluated as a significant comeback for OpenAI. The new model shows revolutionary performance improvements across various work domains.
so_what_ko: 고성능 AI 모델을 활용하여 D2C 비즈니스의 고객 서비스, 콘텐츠 생성, 데이터 분석 등의 업무 효율성을 크게 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: High-performance AI models can significantly improve D2C business efficiency in customer service, content creation, and data analysis.
key_points: GPT-5.4 achieves SOTA performance in knowledge work and coding
Marks OpenAI's significant comeback
Revolutionary performance improvements across work domains

title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
description: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
summary_ko: Descript이 OpenAI 모델을 활용하여 대규모 다국어 비디오 더빙을 구현하고 있습니다. 번역의 의미와 타이밍을 최적화하여 여러 언어에서 자연스러운 음성을 제공합니다. AI 기술을 통해 글로벌 콘텐츠 현지화가 혁신적으로 개선되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Descript is implementing large-scale multilingual video dubbing using OpenAI models. It optimizes translation meaning and timing to provide natural speech across multiple languages. AI technology is revolutionarily improving global content localization.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 다국어 더빙 기술을 활용하여 D2C 브랜드의 글로벌 마케팅 콘텐츠 제작 비용을 절감하고 현지화 품질을 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: AI-based multilingual dubbing technology can reduce D2C brands' global marketing content production costs and improve localization quality.
key_points: Descript uses OpenAI for multilingual video dubbing at scale
Optimizes translation meaning and timing for natural speech
AI revolutionizing global content localization

title: Codex Security: now in research preview
description: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 Codex Security를 연구 프리뷰로 출시했습니다. 이는 프로젝트 컨텍스트를 분석하여 복잡한 보안 취약점을 탐지, 검증 및 패치하는 AI 애플리케이션 보안 에이전트입니다. 높은 신뢰성과 낮은 노이즈로 보안 문제를 해결할 수 있습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI has launched Codex Security in research preview. It's an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities. It can solve security issues with high confidence and low noise.
so_what_ko: AI 보안 솔루션을 도입하여 D2C 플랫폼의 보안 취약점을 자동으로 탐지하고 해결함으로써 고객 데이터 보호와 비즈니스 연속성을 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Implementing AI security solutions can enhance customer data protection and business continuity by automatically detecting and resolving D2C platform security vulnerabilities.
key_points: Codex Security launched in research preview
AI agent for detecting and patching complex vulnerabilities
High confidence detection with reduced noise

title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
description: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
summary_ko: Balyasny Asset Management가 GPT-5.4를 활용하여 투자 분석용 AI 연구 엔진을 구축했습니다. 엄격한 모델 평가와 에이전트 워크플로우를 통해 대규모 투자 분석을 혁신하고 있습니다. AI 기술이 금융 투자 분야에서 실질적인 성과를 보여주고 있습니다.
summary_en: Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investment analysis using GPT-5.4. It's transforming large-scale investment analysis through rigorous model evaluation and agent workflows. AI technology is showing practical results in financial investment sectors.
so_what_ko: AI 연구 시스템을 활용하여 D2C 비즈니스의 시장 분석, 고객 행동 예측, 투자 의사결정 등을 고도화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: AI research systems can enhance D2C business market analysis, customer behavior prediction, and investment decision-making processes.
key_points: Balyasny built AI research engine with GPT-5.4
Uses rigorous model evaluation and agent workflows
Transforms investment analysis at scale

title: Domino’s redefines celebrity meals in social-first campaign
description: Ahead of March Madness, the pizza brand is hoping influencers will drive sales.
summary_ko: 도미노피자가 March Madness를 앞두고 소셜 미디어 중심의 셀러브리티 밀 캠페인을 재정의하고 있습니다. 이 캠페인은 인플루언서들을 통해 매출 증대를 목표로 하고 있습니다. 브랜드는 전통적인 셀러브리티 마케팅 방식에서 벗어나 소셜 퍼스트 전략을 채택했습니다.
summary_en: Domino's is redefining celebrity meals through a social-first campaign ahead of March Madness. The pizza brand is leveraging influencers to drive sales growth. The campaign represents a shift from traditional celebrity marketing to a social-media-focused approach.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통적인 셀러브리티 마케팅보다 인플루언서와 소셜 미디어를 활용한 캠페인이 더 효과적일 수 있음을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider that influencer-driven social campaigns may be more effective than traditional celebrity marketing approaches.
key_points: Domino's launches social-first celebrity meal campaign
Focus on influencer partnerships to drive sales
Timing aligned with March Madness event

title: Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
description: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 추론 모델의 사고 체인 제어에 관한 CoT-Control 연구를 발표했습니다. 연구 결과 추론 모델들이 자신의 사고 체인을 제어하는데 어려움을 겪는 것으로 나타났습니다. 이는 AI 안전성 보장을 위한 모니터링 가능성을 강화하는 결과로 해석됩니다.
summary_en: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control research on reasoning models' chain of thought control capabilities. The study finds that reasoning models struggle to effectively control their chains of thought. This reinforces the importance of monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들이 AI 추론 모델을 도입할 때 모델의 한계를 이해하고 적절한 모니터링 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies implementing AI reasoning models should understand their limitations and establish proper monitoring systems.
key_points: CoT-Control research reveals reasoning model limitations
Models struggle with chain of thought control
Monitorability reinforced as safety mechanism

title: Introducing GPT-5.4
description: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 전문 업무용 최신 프론티어 모델인 GPT-5.4를 출시했습니다. 이 모델은 최첨단 코딩, 컴퓨터 사용, 도구 검색 기능과 100만 토큰 컨텍스트를 제공합니다. GPT-5.4는 OpenAI의 가장 능력 있고 효율적인 모델로 소개되었습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4, their most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work. The model features state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search capabilities, and 1M-token context. GPT-5.4 represents OpenAI's latest advancement in AI model capabilities.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 GPT-5.4의 향상된 코딩과 도구 검색 기능을 활용해 고객 서비스 자동화와 업무 효율성을 크게 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can leverage GPT-5.4's enhanced coding and tool search capabilities to significantly improve customer service automation and operational efficiency.
key_points: GPT-5.4 launched as OpenAI's most capable model
Features 1M-token context and advanced coding abilities
Designed specifically for professional work applications

title: AI and SEO: What AI means for the future of SEO [Expert Tips & Interview]
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is rewriting the playbook of so much of our lives — how we interact, how we learn, how we complete daily tasks, and sometimes even what we eat for dinner. So, of course, AI and the future of SEO are no different.
summary_ko: HubSpot이 AI가 SEO의 미래에 미치는 영향에 대한 전문가 팁과 인터뷰를 제공했습니다. AI는 우리의 상호작용, 학습, 일상 업무 처리 방식을 재편하고 있습니다. SEO 분야 역시 AI로 인해 근본적인 변화를 겪고 있는 것으로 분석됩니다.
summary_en: HubSpot provides expert tips and interviews on how AI impacts the future of SEO. AI is rewriting how we interact, learn, complete daily tasks, and make decisions. The SEO landscape is undergoing fundamental changes due to AI integration.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 SEO 전략을 채택하여 검색 가시성을 높이고 고객 발견 가능성을 개선해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must adopt AI-powered SEO strategies to enhance search visibility and improve customer discoverability.
key_points: AI fundamentally changing SEO practices
Expert insights on AI-SEO integration
Comprehensive guide for marketers

title: #200: Anthropic vs. the Pentagon, OpenAI's $110B Round, Interview with Claude Code’s Creator & Block’s AI-Driven Layoffs
description:
Episode 200 arrived in the midst of a very dramatic week in AI and we recorded it live with AI Academy Mastery members for the first time!

This week, Paul and Mike discuss an eventful 72 hours beginning with the Trump administration’s ultimatum to Anthropic. Eventually Anthropic refused, got blacklisted, and hours later OpenAI stepped in to take the deal. Paul and Mike unpack every twist, including why Peter Thiel's fingerprints on both sides make this even wilder.

Also: OpenAI's $110B funding round, Claude Code creator Boris Cherney on why coding is "effectively solved" (and what that means for your job), Block laying off 4,000 people and naming AI as the reason, and a doomer economic essay that actually moved Wall Street.

Show Notes: Access the show notes and show links here

Click here to take this week's AI Pulse.

Timestamps:

00:00:00 — Intro

00:03:30 — AI Pulse Survey Results

00:07:08 — Anthropic vs. US Government

00:44:55 — OpenAI Funding, Amazon Partnership, Response to
summary_ko: Marketing AI Show 200회에서 Anthropic과 미국 정부의 갈등, OpenAI의 1,100억 달러 펀딩 라운드를 다뤘습니다. Anthropic이 트럼프 행정부의 요구를 거부하고 블랙리스트에 오른 후 OpenAI가 그 자리를 차지했습니다. Block은 AI를 이유로 4,000명을 해고한다고 발표했습니다.
summary_en: Marketing AI Show episode 200 covers Anthropic's conflict with the US government and OpenAI's $110B funding round. Anthropic refused the Trump administration's ultimatum, got blacklisted, and OpenAI stepped in. Block announced laying off 4,000 people, citing AI as the reason.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 도입이 인력 구조조정으로 이어질 수 있음을 인식하고, AI 기술 투자와 인력 관리 전략을 균형 있게 접근해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should recognize that AI adoption may lead to workforce restructuring and balance AI investment with strategic workforce management.
key_points: Anthropic-US government conflict over AI partnerships
OpenAI secures $110B funding round
Block cites AI for 4,000 employee layoffs
